attributes.acceptanceCriteria:
- [ ] `sticky-note.gts` defines a `StickyNote` card extending `CardDef` with title, body, color, x, y, rotation, author, createdAt fields
- [ ] Color defaults to `yellow`; x and y default to `0`
- [ ] `isolated`, `embedded`, and `fitted` templates are implemented and render the body text
- [ ] Color is reflected in template output (background tint matching the chosen color)
- [ ] `sticky-note.test.gts` wraps all tests inside a `module('sticky-note', …)` block
- [ ] Tests cover default values, round-trip serialization, and template rendering for all three templates
- [ ] `Spec/sticky-note.json` exists, adopts the base Spec card, and links at least 3 example instances
- [ ] At least 3 example instances exist under `StickyNote/` with different colors
- [ ] All files lint clean and tests pass
